_meta.generator_note: This is a semantic compiled module spec, not a CSV-row wrapper.

tests.assertion: students and student_uploads collections exist with required fields.
School coordinator can download template only for own participation.
Valid CSV uploads, parses and creates student rows with validation status.
Missing student_name, grade or consent_obtained causes validation failure.
Duplicate students in same school+participation are flagged.
Students without consent cannot be finalised.
Candidate IDs are globally unique and stable after finalisation.
Valid students can be finalised and confirmed_student_count is set.
Cannot finalise when valid student count is zero.
School cannot edit students after count finalisation.
Post-lock staff override requires reason and audit.
School coordinator cannot access another school's students by changing school_id.
Public role cannot read students or student_uploads.
Evaluator cannot see parent contact/payment/internal notes.
Finance can see aggregate counts but not student personal data.
Student upload file has no public URL and is school/staff scoped.
Every future student module bug fix adds a regression test.

acceptance_criteria: School can upload valid student CSV/XLSX.
Duplicate and consent errors are caught before finalisation.
No public or cross-school student data leakage.
